zh.lifeSummary: William of Washington是Walter de Washington和Joan juliana de Whitchester的兒子，於大約1242年出生在英國達勒姆華盛頓。他於1265年與Margaret de Morville結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他於1264年登記服兵役。他去世於1290年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: Washington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Washington in Durham, possibly also from Washington in Sussex. The Durham placename derives from an Old English personal name Hwassa, Hwæssa + the Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. In North America, this surname is by far most common among African Americans (see 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Washington (or George Washington), adopted in honor of George Washington, the 1st president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in most cases probably for the same reason.

History: George Washington (1732–99), 1st president of the US (1789–97), was born at Bridges Creek, VA. His great-grandfather had emigrated from Dillicar in Westmorland in 1658. George Washington was a slaveowner, but he became troubled with the institution of slavery. Shortly before his death he decided that his slaves have to be freed after the death of his wife. — With the passage of time, the surname Washington has come to be borne by more African Americans (around 90% of all bearers) than English-Americans. A prominent example was the educator Booker T. Washington (1856–1915), born a slave in VA, who adopted his surname from his stepfather, Washington Ferguson.

variants.name: President
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word president, probably adopted as a surname in honor of one of the early presidents of the US (compare Washington and Jefferson ) or simply because of the importance of the presidential function.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: William of Washington was born about 1242, in Washington, Durham, England as the son of Walter de Washington and Joan juliana de Whitchester. He married Margaret de Morville in 1265. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He registered for military service in 1264. He died in 1290, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

ja.lifeSummary: William of Washingtonは約1242年にイギリスダルハムワシュイントンでWalter de WashingtonとJoan juliana de Whitchesterの息子として生まれた。1265年にMargaret de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1264年に兵役登録をした。彼は1290年に故郷で49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William of Washington(은)는 대략 1242년 영국 뒤람 와신그턴에서 Walter de Washington(와)과 Joan juliana de Whitchester의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1265년 Margaret de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1264년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1290년 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William of Washington родился около 1242 г. в местности вашингтон, дурам, Англия. Его родителей звали Walter de Washington и Joan juliana de Whitchester. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Morville в 1265 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. В 1264 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1290 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.
